items.name: 待办事项整理助手

profile.name: 待办事项整理助手
profile.goal: 帮助用户整理今天的待办事项，并提供执行步骤。
profile.trigger: 用户请求整理今天的待办事项
profile.output: 整理后的待办事项列表及执行步骤
profile.constraints: Required capabilities: semantic-understanding, network-research | Runtime hooks: controlled network lookup
profile.checkPrompt: 请确认您需要我帮助整理今天的待办事项吗？
profile.noInputAction: 好的，如果需要，请告诉我您的待办事项。
profile.hasInputAction: 好的，请提供您的待办事项列表。

items.artifact:
# Handle demand: 你好，智能体

## Goal
你好，能说话吗

## Primary User


## Trigger


## Required Inputs
[]

## Output
先完成需求处理，再返回结果、建议或可交付物。

## Proactive Check Prompt


## If No New Input


## If New Input Arrives
False

## Network Lookup
Allowed: False
Preferred Sources: []
Lookup Policy: official-only

## Constraints
Required capabilities: semantic-understanding, network-research | Runtime hooks: controlled network lookup

## HomeHub Execution Notes
- 在语音或文字对话中识别用户需求。
- 如果资料不完整，先主动追问，再执行。
- 在允许范围内复用本地家庭记忆、文档、日程和消息桥接输入。
- 在执行过程中持续给用户简短进度反馈。

proposedBrain.mission: Handle demand: 你好，能说话吗

profile.goal:
Original request: 詳細を確認する https://campaign.jp.mercari.com/pages/FriendReferralPage_2/index.html?referrer=email

招待キャンペーン実施中

あなたの招待コードを使って、家族や友人をメルカリに招待しませんか？
メルカリへの招待であなたもお相手もそれぞれ500円分のポイントがもらえるお得なプログラムが実施中です。

招待した人数に上限はありません。
この機会にぜひ、たくさんの方を招待してみてください！


招待方法

1. マイページの「招待して500ポイント GET」をタップ
2. あなたの招待コードをコピーして、招待したい方へシェア
3. お相手が会員登録時に招待コードを入力すれば完了！


ポイントについて

・付与されるポイント：招待した方、招待された方にそれぞれP500を付与
・ポイントの有効期間：付与された日を含めた30日間
・ポイントの付与時期：招待された方の登録完了から14日後までに付与


本プログラムの詳細は、下記のページでもご確認いただけます。

👉 キャンペーンページを見る https://campaign.jp.mercari.com/pages/FriendReferralPage_2/index.html??referrer=email

今後ともメルカリをよろしくお願いいたします。

このメールは送信専用です。ご返信いただいてもお答えできませんのでご了承ください。お問い合わせ、メールの配信停止は以下のリンクからお願いします。

お問い合わせ https://help.jp.mercari.com/guide/articles/749/メールの配信停止 https://sp.mercari.jp/unsubscribe/?token=efd0cfc1c30a2be7392c01759ccd49a5abee588e&type=email_news&user_id=265478151

https://twitter.com/mercari_jp?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthorhttps://www.instagram.com/mercari_jp/?hl=ja

https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/%E3%83%95%E3%83%AA%E3%83%9E%E3%82%A2%E3%83%97%E3%83%AA%E3%81%AF%E3%83%A1%E3%83%AB%E3%82%AB%E3%83%AA-%E3%83%A1%E3%83%AB%E3%83%9A%E3%82%A4%E3%81%AE%E3%82%B9%E3%83%9E%E3%83%9B%E6%B1%BA%E6%B8%88%E3%81%A7%E3%82%82%E3%81%A3%E3%81%A8%E3%81%8A%E5%BE%97/id667861049https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.kouzoh.mercari&hl=ja&gl=US

株式会社メルカリ
〒106-6118 東京都港区六本木6-10-1 六本木ヒルズ森タワー
©2023 Mercari, inc.
Clarification answer: Google Developer  
Program<https://c.gle/ADMV5J-ZagxaCAx5GgsbXRLhPdYbKeasrEpthpBSFsWY2RGUgKGZk586azcWcJ0gCAlUThDQtaAk--ZUPdPuIVYRYRJhqjo47Y2nU6h7twxDJFOoo_Y64WMo1DNXjqcFRnNc-gm87L2wn4kUylhZiZcaW6qomRqSK7eP7g>

Written by Richard  
Seroter<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_G_cWk89GQgK_DuiRRWx6I_88lsVWogL3dVEiiysMaR1zgrmkbN08PNe2prZhIsE43ydqqr9oF0kaJJCUyUDHhMu4INP5ijsCJBL9Fodi4P_-Ps9869K0-ikNh4qQvX-w>

BUILDER SPOTLIGHT:

Everybody builds.

Google AI Studio just changed the game for builders. Full-stack vibe coding  
with production-grade database and authentication options, along with a  
stronger coding agent. Create multiplayer experiences, take advantage of  
modern web tools, and continue your build sessions over long periods. Bring  
your ideas to life like never before. For many, this takes the place of the  
Firebase Studio  
experiment,<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_iX9Vhzkyp7qE-cToonfKzI3aGhtjv6HZLBQjNp3jjrpCUrCE-Z-ydYz7LQiyCZSBRjwW0SXczgrLABxYjQG349fuSLZ9or-uBQOSGafFqOi6NmIfa79S6NYSVOntBwoOGeolMrXSchakDjYWul6bUZbvYvImlT0-wxQoVF0XFc9Tj730giS2u1UGI_NA4uwO-5XXkfQNVQQ>  
and clarifies your choices. Read the launch  
post!<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9eXc0-weuCdfjrxxf-aUb1iEMN2tmeA3wmmFYaiB-9UBRGCAxds7PmDtNgH19YDSVd9fPAM0kqDsr1zzvgnk2t2qPnrARRJsQ55Nfu91ZWaTRQJkVm8vvgMVJpwE9FWguj6af2lMJqXW_nAu6ky71R9YtxmWhjfg5tQbFYBVkF1KgGSIHKCey2Hn_f0vy7OVz-_t2HCqZTi4lvfDiFQHUTArJ7GAFuxngbwDFhl_EFek1a4NTt8Kw>

Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most efficient Gemini 3 series  
model<https://c.gle/ADMV5J-0RmbWcBubMyYdFLqPfPO4uRw1_jvCQ5iYYDfvpfOnl9HzwEH-2K0imw33p7hArs1ljey9_DQD5rSrEBmA2CcnjsEdbBogp_pdKRsIKAftC0QVb6xmTjdAq45wVlz5GAe0FWa93PLXF1Ct5KMC9OTBpMN-BubtFO91RHAVleMSBoBk4QsDBWOpRNIA2vHhZe9OlTuIA51pY5-LdIwiPnHh7YB2sA>

Build better with the fast and cost-efficient Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.

This excellent Gemini 3 series model is designed to give you tremendous  
performance at a fraction of the cost of larger models. It’s great at  
reasoning and multimodal understanding. Try it out in AI Studio and Vertex  
AI.

Learn  
more<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9zl3JIqjUxyj75dwaYsiNuIhjj_TWTzFCN_z1AJ2vCmSwilFyR80OJHqsj5tMjubCErHFukRndqN7ZFc8PzrtnoY6mlxpfcNqff0Nd9BDURbzEeuBb3IGutHs1eGyEstzfwZJEx4BOnjTueal4qTCRJT4R42h4GfDPDP7S3FalrX9K1FdTmXf-vdGyeGed4Ew8Ht8Avh4DCzVITWQfJb03jPzvJw>

Google offers many MCP servers including fully managed ones and new open  
ones like this one from  
Colab<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_dzN_iehfjnUA5UfZeG-fcXUlrjyu1ONr6lUT_s02lPRfbm3fA5XYD4Piw77cDAGrnwxwMThogSpjEC5g5nNqdTwW80_qdGBfqL556Al5wM9GJd_1atxxxUBGizE-rdCFS1vv95bin3BTiscV-auU8ByPC4zetzaDRCPO94aXeIC-T8U2aIZEKZKrwxmAib3u7O06To8nKJk6FyjrsVdGx8tG-9OZdsE69_Ad6bA>

Build smarter with MCP servers from Google.

Did you know that Google offers over a dozen fully managed MCP servers so  
that your tools and agents can more easily “talk” to their favorite  
services?

Whether Google  
Maps<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9s-DrXo6jcsErlh6d2GWK5AdqVniHYRd4vD8sdADvs5vnUUlEE1AN-at3bABI_ye7aUDxObL4npvnNnBt4xe7DgYnhd5Wu2-eGoiiB3qus68UQsgx0ljDJ_4PoWNuGrUJJwE4WKBdJv7jx4nMHmfIx5Lsd3CfRQHsveA>  
or Cloud  
services<https://c.gle/ADMV5J91IpLKCzqciuZUsniwLQisKVeKy2zslgaUnwv_nArglXr5XOJVDEoyLpvyKGHj_50oSQXU8NYZg42jwgtTS2gsxY3j5HR_MCxwxFntK2JHN3NnVC0Tmchj8dAROAskFGJmmIRarpi38tRdK8R1SSllM0WSxR3i-FiNPS35YlmBTpNJW_tvzQbYbFbXsT9LECH7b4sKEoc>  
like BigQuery, Firestore, Vertex AI, and Cloud Run, you get easy access to  
safe, available endpoints. And don’t miss the new open source Colab MCP  
server<https://c.gle/ADMV5J8lHeop2ypKM84mlrUnILzXMPFiIZZj_Y2h1M2h7CpB95FupEKYI3abOjw2Inn2wslM_uGm9iaxsPbmlfxwC96-xJsWCHw0HygiB-xEal34heYYFYUh0MKZrDnJpAw-N-9SofK0FecJe4zXnrm7ymcFV2HvsxQzqQP37v2YzwjYI6fEcJvAhek5R5hPRwDuTSVRpv5cXq9KNlXsx7r3c37j2RtpMuyjet9E-oFmrTRmX9H_JQSUYju-SZRA>  
that lets you treat notebooks as tools!

Googler Aron Eidelman explains how to build production AI agents that are  
protected and responsible with  
data<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9eOLfkrAji0wPyLQx4jx-fBfaV8jnqV5V0Sq33GRW7IYG3cQ-gkK137JfDnuoCEljkVauKEzZwIgQS2eqs2VlTtDA6E80OAhnhVOz-07gI5h85yKP6m7Uw5JkpUJntnSV06bXbXQrFWLsP1u9xC_pQcg>

Build safer with ADK and Antigravity.

Aron’s got a great video that explains what it means to protect your custom  
agents with products like Model Armor, while preventing data leakage and  
other risks. See how the Agent Development Kit and Google Antigravity help  
along the way.

Learn  
more<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_nf_1vtoh5uClvfcs0_TQH0jIse8a_8QFvGZSpEwn48-fymkTzOQivQ33Gh5Q-FLcuZ27t29kpEvW2Dk4EZGhm1xunw5VYSaxo61zL4oxuHWT0SZ4uRwMZ90d5ISCnjeiT1Lo9XVLE8Ct7goF1NlWdjw>

FAST FIVE

[Devices] Now Available: New Support for Setup & Reset Instructions for  
Matter Devices.

You can now provide a tailored setup experience for your Matter Plugs and  
Lights within the Google Home app. Use the Developer Console to upload  
step-by-step instructions and visual assets (like LED pulse animations) for  
Setup and Reset modes. This  
update<https://c.gle/ADMV5J8lF491i1aCA733qz6qnYQiLKvgY2D0gFaY5d712QcUqP8hfV6L_WbQm-1aWCVoVwyg2w-RnPm2Jgj229Q8d6iEi7UPpyBjOv8KLK2k_R5eHKKVAODOurCJpnwBUZsaU_x1ZVUrkh4O4igPjbvjmgK6-fkl_Tai-MYlDwgtLgt1DjU>  
helps users confirm device behavior in real-time, leading to a 10% increase  
in commissioning success rates.

[Cloud] Secure your Cloud Run apps with on-click IAP integration.

Identity-aware proxy (IAP) gives you control over who can access your  
application, whether that’s inside or outside of your organization. You can  
now enable this for Cloud Run  
services<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_o4B2Ibvkx5XcI7rO5SkmT80BT7QMUgWsC6RPXxNV7uAyeVnIRSuQuaNJBjCyOQ8IgUz3sM1K4WpyfHhTxHb2zYhIHIxAfCSWxqLgwAoq2LwHyLqojokHsyLGUKRIoFFUji34KE8hTAlQRQv5axLQlRjPuDpftPm66DfMej2j07_Skcc0IB9DU3emk3Hpb1Y3wRHIk5aZRP2PfHtyBIvYjNmEgMif8kP_ZNKdCDG9r>  
with one-click in the console, a single gcloud CLI flag, or one Terraform  
configuration.

[Android] Evaluate LLM capabilities for Android development with Android  
Bench.

We just delivered the first version of this leaderboard of LLMs for Android  
development. We used real-world Android development scenarios to ensure we  
had a realistic assessment. Check out the first  
results!<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9SbKKQKEfd9OaZ_M4DhpZqxC2IKBYepupwqKuAUpqqHKfEIzNrMDDUTXC3eHaW-ymVqyk94Sv-AUQdfRSW7wEYTVwqfueWnbYQCr38TekXw71tVGUblDW0pa_p6_WlAlqn5L8WgSGTej1h46CTIxyHxY1hn1UUdx3Rcz84GUpA3nHDAuslwBBQbDIG1KVR0R0ckY53Dlpyhi3Ne-W7SgYPEILbMIhZ>

[Firebase] Firebase A/B testing now available for the web.

Run, analyze, and scale experiments with Firebase A/B testing. This popular  
capability for mobile devs is now available for those building Firebase web  
apps  
too.<https://c.gle/ADMV5J-HB3RoEKiH9oAYVcbbA-1oXJa41zSzHi1FEU_9muh9lkScEBbF9ACY5rXcuJ5lThNP5jYszcy5ZgYDJLhGSWPn59qUPys2pcYK8wDdUTovquvNKtqTwoqw23jjQv5m_ZAkBNetUWWho9VJvudJWe4PW5vmDN0XLxngu1E0bJhHJ4Gj0qSISddFlsF9nSK_DnaZpZ_dUmWFPwWNU1wE9QHd4w>

[Stitch] Create and iterate on designs using natural language in the  
upgraded Stitch.

I really like using this service. And now it’s even better. This product  
evolution makes it easier to explore ideas quickly and work within a new  
infinite canvas to iterate on your work. This, and much more in the latest  
update.<https://c.gle/ADMV5J8pjiPBEkNfzDYRSr2Y6Bs92wwq9KH2ycIySGwKoAQngWWQPPFWe2MpopoTei_paPr2zh2PNYgvD9f1osbNgdSPDVFOI7M4hexgdmqWvREejHzSWnJDQUlKayhsRkat6jY1F6acTQxDiGU74jN3T_YBaUMZ0JS4xl6DSCN-20xz3ECut6Yuo5xnH5a95Ef0k3HHF-Cieok8rP08EiJENbvSTzgUDMY>

LEVEL UP WITH LEARNING

Go from design-to-code with Antigravity and Stitch

Take a look at this brand-new codelab which teaches us how to build  
high-fidelity UIs in Stitch, and connect them to Antigravity using the  
Stitch MCP server.

Start  
learning<https://c.gle/ADMV5J80bVCfx13PXaTHdXEToyTQzhczWy4-LB9DO4U_SQC4PCUV5SmFML-qqZOCFQKuR2T4arab1wf03i6fHdLeHerjpGGgwpdEc72CEF2WzSqoZkTJiYjHFcs7jsAaSCgkJ-mBvx0-fHMm9Vji_LKm1OW0WFBMmm7lAWKd2cxzBVvUWvnA6hwmK_v5dmXJ9s08tymgNMzi-PPl7ZB3v9dQ5g>

Read the developer’s guide to AI agent protocols

Can’t tell your MCP from your AP2? Don’t feel bad, it’s a lot to keep up  
with. Take advantage of posts like this one that breaks down the core  
protocols that matter for AI agent developers. It includes code samples for  
each!

Read  
more<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9Kzq6N-cW8HVze_7OpAQXOoHFaYGJhA9dZAZ8q_s2VdGHm6UNtOm5nZlcxnKgZDwItFYEKLTATx3leF9wI5S5IjqQL8Q3VjUegZbazkK3CyDfOTdCw_fFkDztniakDPQH_yg31JXwFMOsVPpdmaVLnIWrrlCf4Kl2g2logkPxv0c30jl4IP6NXogUZcYQ>

DEVELOPER COMMUNITY

Angular community experts share what they’re learning

Many of us are not just changing what we build, but how we build. This  
roundup of resources and examples from Angular community experts may  
inspire you to try some new patterns.

Read the  
article<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_1jHL8iLnPAiuz8qiQegjxnBtYo96c5pmE4Yh52Uqfg5R4e0_skZze2D4TKirjadBKAW-7voIQWivB3NR4fbbB4oxcodFav3gJC12lbzOupVqPfkJqcJPLtHdOOW-bmNTgQNkWsIH7xgvwQZnI9xOcce7YtyFAIq65N67cpSs4rCy0TjvQU7S7IB4gGwJgeCrE-tskiXxBV3VAWTFRTGx8YgK1KIF9-UWWj2sU3GOEKcZVhfrGcSMw49YCsRgqvEauJic>

Query images and videos directly in BigQuery

Is there anything BigQuery can’t do? I’m always amazed by its power and  
flexibility. This post explores the way to query structured,  
semi-structured, and unstructured data—thanks BigLake Object  
Tables!—without leaving BigQuery.

Read the  
article<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9XmkRVZ_fStjCkJaQKzsy4Z71fLc1KmEkIp52-p9DoLHiDM3HfLFemi9mQKVrFTwyrkyxeSXGVxHgNyfN_eP4Lz987d_fXBoQGteYdwwekrlDAZpoh9atbx7AhqPbSt6PSDEeADDkIYFQy9cOTh6fYb7LZy6RlCoY_3QspdYlnqpJXL3PuIxweK1HRdu6nqJ4Yj5ychKpSTcHGV_3TX5DeXD6E8x_ebkAiWBeEmmj4zEiqOWgiDdkhCOQQMTfsQWU_Y-Uo5KUM1BLPPbRWSHuth-t9LS7e-Ok>

Connect with us

Web<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_8_FjSHwi1AC5DfBon34J9pWFooY6J78UgoflVWqpiOaHk294haWOZyNEfvhhjMCBL1H6SqQUAJ7nnZ0p5O_3oFwIE0mG7SHTK1gks-iYYnDR29dJLsia-L7fO6iAvlU6LyXzD>

X<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_bM9aaqrgwm5zv_ZmA7ptQSOVPCWxQzTWBLIAVvrc7OTGiUXeskwNwqiDq5P4NC4_jQSsoQ4LNfwwdusbp9scOgp4fcXc2a4tYX5Ix_jk6Et1LNovJ>

linkedIn<https://c.gle/ADMV5J9_lGXsyLMVvuvUVmisOr7pA-bFSzSjJtK-4TVv9I9bTJ9z7_Sg535aYh4S1-Ot60oHqbublA-BTe0OaI4FY5zUq7asg6ZEzB-EbGaBDXspt4byiXBexQVb4XKqU1YFnOGLShOqChWr-cq3KbBVIV4BqkqhYgoinZpB_QSZFp-19W-HAdtRFwwNNg1B>

Youtube<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_8MryLHaaizUbnLp1ZR030XycAkJgiWG0qV5pZbPn8kKa1xndomS_va9eTuO7JvDb6UwuRM2tkiO85gAIUkfaO9O5BMCqSwrFKVj3xjd6mnS8AWASmYUJuKckoXn59ZSsPq6yeOvzEudcVZC0>

Tommy Hahn，你好：

你好，

我们正在发送验证码来验证这个邮箱，以便我们在审核你的身份证件后联系你。

427142

切勿与任何人分享这组验证码。

如果有人索要这组验证码

切勿将这组验证码分享给任何人，即使是对方声称是 Facebook 或 Meta 工作人员时，如出现这种情况，对方可能企图入侵你的账户。

并未期望收到此邮件？

如果你收到这封邮件，但并未尝试过验证身份，则可能是有人企图入侵你的账户。只要你未将这组验证码分享给任何人，就无需执行其他任何步骤。如果你想加强账户安全，请访问账户安全检查。

谢谢！ Facebook 安全团队

items.name: 家庭账单

profile.name: 家庭账单
profile.goal: 记录用户的消费并提供每周的消费总结和提醒
profile.trigger: 用户输入消费或根据图片内容进行金额记录，或者询问本周的消费总额和详细情况
profile.inputs: [{'name': '消费类型', 'type': 'string', 'description': '用户输入的消费类型，如衣服、餐饮等'}, {'name': '消费金额', 'type': 'number', 'description': '用户输入的消费金额'}, {'name': '图片内容', 'type': 'image', 'description': '用户提供的图片，用于识别消费金额'}]
profile.output: [{'name': '记录结果', 'type': 'string', 'description': '消费记录的结果，包括消费类型和金额'}, {'name': '每周总结', 'type': 'string', 'description': '每周六晚上六点发送的消费总结消息，包括总花费和详细消费情况'}]
profile.constraints: [{'condition': '无法判断是什么消费时', 'action': '用其他来记录'}, {'condition': '用户询问本周的消费总额和详细情况', 'action': '总结性告诉我花费总额和都花在什么地方了'}]
profile.checkPrompt: 请确认您是否需要创建一个名为“家庭账单”的智能体，该智能体能够记录用户的消费并提供每周的消费总结和提醒。
profile.noInputAction: 请提供更多详细信息以便我更好地理解您的需求。
profile.hasInputAction: 好的，请告诉我您希望如何使用这个智能体。

items.artifact:
# 家庭账单

## Goal
记录用户的消费并提供每周的消费总结和提醒

## Primary User
家庭成员，使用你的人。

## Trigger
用户输入消费或根据图片内容进行金额记录，或者询问本周的消费总额和详细情况

## Required Inputs
[{'name': '消费类型', 'type': 'string', 'description': '用户输入的消费类型，如衣服、餐饮等'}, {'name': '消费金额', 'type': 'number', 'description': '用户输入的消费金额'}, {'name': '图片内容', 'type': 'image', 'description': '用户提供的图片，用于识别消费金额'}]

## Output
[{'name': '记录结果', 'type': 'string', 'description': '消费记录的结果，包括消费类型和金额'}, {'name': '每周总结', 'type': 'string', 'description': '每周六晚上六点发送的消费总结消息，包括总花费和详细消费情况'}]

## Proactive Check Prompt
请确认您是否需要创建一个名为“家庭账单”的智能体，该智能体能够记录用户的消费并提供每周的消费总结和提醒。

## If No New Input
请提供更多详细信息以便我更好地理解您的需求。

## If New Input Arrives
好的，请告诉我您希望如何使用这个智能体。

## Network Lookup
Allowed: False
Preferred Sources: 
Lookup Policy: safe-general

## Constraints
[{'condition': '无法判断是什么消费时', 'action': '用其他来记录'}, {'condition': '用户询问本周的消费总额和详细情况', 'action': '总结性告诉我花费总额和都花在什么地方了'}]

## HomeHub Execution Notes
- 在语音或文字对话中识别用户需求。
- 如果资料不完整，先主动追问，再执行。
- 在允许范围内复用本地家庭记忆、文档、日程和消息桥接输入。
- 在执行过程中持续给用户简短进度反馈。
